description_long: This object is a cylindrical cigarette with a distinct orange-brown filter at one end and a white paper-wrapped body. The filter section is clean and sharply separated from the rest of the cigarette, which transitions into a white shaft. The opposite end of the filter shows a darkened, slightly charred tip, indicating the area where the cigarette would be lit. The surface of the cigarette is matte, with the paper wrapping appearing smooth and slightly fibrous. There are no visible brand logos, emblems, or text on the exterior. The cigarette is unbroken, with no visible ash tip or packaging present.
description: A white cigarette with an orange-brown filter and a darkened, unlit tip. The surface is smooth and matte, with no visible branding or ash.
description_view_0: The cigarette is seen from a narrow angle, highlighting the orange-brown filter and a glimpse of the white body.
description_view_1: A side view showing the full length, with the orange-brown filter on one end and a darkened tip on the other.
description_view_2: The filter end is most prominent, displaying its hexagonal cross-section and clean separation from the white body.
description_view_3: A side view similar to view 1, but with the filter on the left and the darkened tip on the right.
attribute_burn_mark: darkened tip at one end, indicating slight charring
